channel.title: Pages on The Blog of Dr. Moron
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on The Blog of Dr. Moron

item.title: Allow myself to introduce... myself
item.author: morelandsnl@gmail.com (Kenneth Moreland)
item.description: My name is Kenneth Moreland, and I have a blog. Why have I created this site? Because apparently I have too much time on my hands. Lately I have been amusing myself with various geeky projects that one might call hobbies. Every once in a while a get an urge to record what I’m doing in an effort to show off to anyone unlucky enough to be in the general vicinity.
